explanation: The structured natural language property captures the requirement that the autopilot should transition to the "pullup" state whenever sensor limits are exceeded, but only if the pilot is not in control (standby mode) and the system is supported without failures.  This property ensures that the autopilot will safely take over control in emergency situations without false triggering.
decision1_substring: Exceeding sensor limits shall latch an autopilot pullup when the pilot is not in control
decision2_substring: and the system is supported without failures
output_structured_natural_language: whenever limits & !standby & supported & !apfail, immediately satisfy state_is_PULLUP
